hooks.prompt: Run /boot now — execute every step in .agent/skills/boot.md. Verify workspace, recall last session, read goals.md + learned.md + backlog.md, check git remotes, then report status.

You are the DarkFact maintainer agent. Run your end-of-session routine: review what changed this session, update .agent/memory/project/learned.md if new lessons were discovered, update goals.md and backlog.md if tasks completed or new ones found, then run: python3 execution/brain.py wrap-up --summary "$(git log --oneline -3 2>/dev/null || echo 'no git log')" --tags "session,wrap-up"
